case_title: CECILIA RUIZ PERALTA ET AL VS. JOSE J. JIMENEZ GONZALEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 61507919)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-19-2017 CONTINUED TO AUG-30-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PERALTA, CECILIA RUIZ PERALTA, GLORIA AS TO DEFENDANT JIMENEZ GONZALEZ, JOSE J. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-19-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-17-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-26-2017
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT [CONDITIONAL]; (TRANSACTION ID # 61237773) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PERALTA, CECILIA RUIZ PERALTA, GLORIA

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 60391699), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PERALTA, CECILIA RUIZ PERALTA, GLORIA SERVED MAR-02-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE MAR-03-2017 AS TO DEFENDANT JIMENEZ GONZALEZ, JOSE J.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-17-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE AUG-30-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR JAN-30-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. THE OCT-17-2017 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-30-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
